help.text:
🤖 *Welcome — commands*

🆕 "!welcome config"
Guided step-by-step setup.

📋 "!welcome status"
Shows this group's current configuration.

🧪 "!welcome test"
Sends a preview in the current chat, no effect on the real groups.

🧪 "!welcome test grupo"
Runs a real test on the configured groups (marked as a test), using your own data.

✏️ "!welcome set <field> <value>"
Change a single item without redoing everything.
Fields: {{fields}}

Examples:
• "!welcome set comunidade Volleyball Crew"
• "!welcome set fundo gradiente #1f1147 #3a1c71"
• send an image with the caption "!welcome set fundo" to use it as background
• "!welcome set fundo escurecer 40" (0 to 100, image background only)
• "!welcome set fonte serifa" (options: padrao, serifa, monoespacada)
• send an image with the caption "!welcome set avatar" to use as the default photo for people without a profile picture
• "!welcome set addgrupo" (no value — I'll guide you)

🗑️ "!welcome reset"
Deletes this group's configuration.

👉 First time? Run "!welcome config" inside the group you want me to watch — I'll guide you through every step.

_Note: field names and keywords (like "pular", "pronto", theme names) stay in Portuguese, since they're the command syntax._

watchGroup.label: Watched group
watchGroup.body:
👋 Let's set up your welcome bot! It's quick — I'll guide you through every step, no prior knowledge needed.

To start, send *any message* inside the group you want me to watch (I'll announce it when someone joins). For communities, use the announcements group.

_Tip: type "cancelar" at any time to exit without saving._

cardTarget.label: Card group
cardTarget.body:
Which group should I send the welcome card (the image) to?

➜ Send a message there
➜ or type "pular" to use the same group as before

communityName.label: Community name
communityName.body:
What's your community/group called? This name shows up on the card.

➜ Type the name
➜ or "pular" to use the group's own name

cardBackground.label: Card background
cardBackground.body:
Pick the card's look:

🎨 "pular" → purple theme (default)
🎨 a ready-made theme: {{themes}}
🎨 a color with automatic gradient: a #hex code, e.g. #1f1147
🎨 a solid color (no gradient): "sólido #hex"
🎨 a gradient with 2 colors of your choice: "gradiente #hex1 #hex2"
🎨 or send a photo/image to use as background

cardFrame.label: Avatar frame

cardMessage.label: Card message
cardMessage.body:
What message should I send *along with the card*?

Use "{nome}" and "{comunidade}" wherever you like.
Type "padrão" to use this one:

{{defaultMessage}}

smallWelcome.label: Plain-text welcome
smallWelcome.body:
Besides the card, do you want a plain-text welcome in *other* groups when someone joins (no image, just text)?

➜ If so: send a message in each of those groups
➜ If not: type "pronto" to skip this step

smallWelcomeMessage.label: Plain-text welcome message
smallWelcomeMessage.body:
What message should I send in those extra groups (no card)?

Use "{nome}" and "{comunidade}" wherever you like, or type "padrão" to reuse the card's message.

addGroups.label: Auto-add
addGroups.body:
Should I automatically add the person to *another* group as soon as they join (only 1, for account safety)?

➜ If so: send a message inside that group
➜ If not: type "pronto" to skip this step

dmMessage.label: DM message
dmMessage.body:
Last block: message I'll send in the person's DM welcoming them.

Use "{nome}" wherever you want their name.
Type "padrão" to use the message below, or "nenhuma" to skip the DM entirely:

{{defaultMessage}}

dmFailMessage.label: DM failure message
dmFailMessage.body:
If I can't automatically add the person to a group (previous step), do you want an extra DM message alongside the invite links?

Use "{nome}" if you like, or type "pular" to send nothing besides the links.

wizard.timeout: ⏱️ Setup ended due to inactivity (10 minutes with no reply).
wizard.needGroupWatch:
⚠️ This needs to be sent *inside a group*.

Open the group you want to watch and send any message there.
wizard.reattached:
🔗 This group already had a configuration — I relinked it to *this chat*, without changing anything else.

{{status}}
wizard.needGroupCardTarget:
⚠️ This needs to be a group.

Send a message inside it, or type "pular" to use the same group as before.
wizard.backgroundInvalid: ⚠️ Didn't get that. Type "padrão", a theme, a #hex code, "sólido #hex", "gradiente #hex1 #hex2", or send an image.
wizard.frameInvalid: ⚠️ Didn't get that. Type "padrão" or one of these options: {{frames}}.
wizard.smallWelcomeAdded:
✅ Added: "{{name}}".
Send another group or type "pronto".
wizard.smallWelcomeNeedGroup: ⚠️ Send a message *inside the group* you want to notify, or type "pronto" to skip this step.
wizard.addGroupOnlyOne:
⚠️ You can only auto-add to *one* group (for account safety).

Type "pronto" to continue.
wizard.addGroupNeedGroup: ⚠️ Send a message *inside the group* you want to auto-add people to, or type "pronto" to skip this step.
wizard.alreadyInProgress:
⚠️ You already have a setup or edit in progress.

Type "cancelar" in that chat, or wait for it to expire.
wizard.startConfigNeedGroup: ⚠️ Run this command inside the group that will start the configuration.

status.needGroup: ⚠️ Run this command inside the group you want to check.
status.notConfigured:
This group doesn't have a configuration yet.

Run "!welcome config" to create one.

reset.needGroup: ⚠️ Run this command inside the group you want to reset.
reset.nothing: This group has no configuration to delete.
reset.confirmNeeded:
⚠️ *Heads up*
This deletes this group's entire welcome configuration.

Are you sure? Type "!welcome reset confirmar" to delete it for good.
reset.done:
✅ Configuration deleted.

Run "!welcome config" whenever you want to set it up again.

set.needGroup: ⚠️ Run this command inside the configured group.
set.notConfigured:
This group doesn't have a configuration yet.

Run "!welcome config" first.
set.invalidField:
⚠️ Invalid field.

Use one of these: {{fields}}.
Ex: "!welcome set moldura neon"

applySet.imageDownloadFail: ⚠️ Couldn't download that image, try again.
applySet.darkenOnlyImage:
⚠️ This only applies to an image background.

Send an image first with the caption "!welcome set fundo".
applySet.backgroundInvalid:
⚠️ Didn't get that background.

Use a theme ({{themes}}), a #hex code, "sólido #hex", "gradiente #hex1 #hex2", or send the image with the caption "!welcome set fundo".
applySet.frameInvalid:
⚠️ Invalid frame.

Use one of these: {{frames}}.
applySet.fontInvalid:
⚠️ Invalid font.

Use one of these: {{fonts}}.
applySet.avatarNeedsImage: ⚠️ Send an image along with "!welcome set avatar" to use as the default photo, or type "!welcome set avatar padrão" to go back to the plugin's default photo.
applySet.addgroupNeedsGroup:
⚠️ This field needs to be set from inside the target group.

Just type "!welcome set addgroup" (no value) and I'll guide you, or "!welcome set addgroup nenhum" to turn it off.

circuitBreaker.alert:
⚠️ *Auto-add paused*

Too many consecutive failures while adding people to groups. I've turned this off for {{minutes}} minutes to protect the account (this is usually WhatsApp blocking mass adds). I'll use invite links during this period.

test.notConfigured:
⚠️ This chat has no configuration associated with it.

Run "!welcome config" inside the configured group, or check with "!welcome status".
test.previewHeader:
🧪 *Welcome preview*

This is just a simulation using your own contact data — nothing was sent to the real groups.
test.previewCardLabel: 🧪 Card that would be sent to "{{target}}":
test.previewSmallLabel: 🧪 Plain-text welcome that would be sent to "{{target}}":
test.previewDmLabel: 🧪 Message that would be sent in the DM:
test.previewNoDm: 🧪 DM message disabled — nothing would be sent.
test.previewFooter: ✅ Preview complete. Nothing was sent to the configured groups.
test.realHeader: 🧪 *Real test* — sending to the actual configured groups, using your own data. Every message is marked as a test.
test.realDone: ✅ Real test complete. Check the configured groups.

defaults.dmMessage:
Hi, *{nome}*! Welcome to our group! 👋

A quick summary of the rules:

• No NSFW or dark humor
• No spam links, flooding, or annoying content
• Keep topics on-topic

Hope you enjoy the group!
defaults.failIntro: I couldn't automatically add you to some groups. Join through these invites:
